ProjectInfo.name: vibestart
ProjectInfo.annotation: AI development toolkit manager - standards, templates, and skills for AI agents

UC-001.title: Initialize vibestart in user project
UC-001.actor: AI Agent (Kilo Code, Cursor, Claude Code)
UC-001.precondition: User has AI agent installed in VS Code

flow.step-1: Agent clones vibestart repository to .vibestart/ folder

UC-001.postcondition: Project has complete GRACE framework structure

UC-002.title: Initialize GRACE in user project

flow.step-4: Skill creates AGENTS.md with project rules

UC-002.postcondition: Project has GRACE artifacts ready for planning

UC-005.title: Generate AGENTS.md from fragments
UC-005.postcondition: AGENTS.md generated with correct feature set

D-001.rationale: These commands duplicate functionality available in GRACE skills (grace-status, grace-refresh) or can be integrated into vs-init (vs-render)

alt.name: keep-separate
alt.reason: Increases maintenance burden and confuses users

D-002.rationale: Keeps framework separate from user project, allows easy updates and cleanup

alt.name: clone-to-user-home
alt.reason: Windows path issues, agent can't find files

alt.name: copy-to-project-root
alt.reason: Pollutes user project with framework files

technical.constraint-1: Framework must work without runtime (pure markdown/XML)
technical.constraint-2: Must support multiple AI agents (Kilo Code, Cursor, Claude Code)
technical.constraint-3: Must handle Windows, macOS, Linux paths correctly

business.constraint-1: Target audience: developers new to AI-assisted coding
business.constraint-2: Must be installable in one command/paste

regulatory.constraint-1: MIT license - must remain open source

Glossary.term: AI development toolkit framework providing standards, templates, and skills
Contract-driven development methodology with knowledge graphs
AI agent instruction file (SKILL.md) that defines a workflow
Development rule or convention (architecture, error-handling, etc.)
Modular component used to generate AGENTS.md
Long-term memory system for AI agents via MCP
